task_description: Phase 63: Rewrite all 42 fake components (that return JS object trees instead of JSX) across 7 apps into real React components with proper JSX, Tailwind CSS, and accessibility.

verification.summary: All 42 components converted to real JSX. grep returns 0 object-tree matches. pnpm typecheck (109 tasks) passes. pnpm build (84 tasks) passes. Review fixes applied: SVG calc() replaced with numeric coords, role=img changed to role=region, type=button added to all interactive buttons, VoteButtons size prop fixed, void _prop removed, PlacementSelector focus indicator added.
